violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of shredded cheese were stored on the floor in the walk in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The gasket on the white freezer by the door in the kitchen needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Holes in the wall above the counter in the South wall of the kitchen. Holes in the wall in the hall by the kitchen. Holes in the flooring in the kitchen.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Several lights in the kitchen area were missing the shields.
